name: Cracker Barrel Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the Bisquick and buttermilk until a smooth dough forms.
2. Using your hands, lightly dust them with Bisquick to prevent sticking, then knead the dough until it is smooth and elastic.
3. Shape the dough into 16 thin rounds, placing one on top of another to form 8 biscuits in a greased 9-inch round baking pan.
4. Bake at 450°F for 16 to 18 minutes or until golden brown.
5. Immediately spread the tops with butter using a pastry brush.
6. To make BONANZA Copycats, add 4 teaspoons of sugar. Shape into 6 patties that are about 1-inch thick and 3-inches in diameter. Place them close together in the greased round baking pan.
7. Brush the tops with soft butter and bake for an additional 18 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Allow to cool for 10 minutes before serving. Split with your thumbs instead of cutting with a knife.
9. These biscuits do not keep well. For best results, reheat in a low oven immediately after baking by lightly brushing the tops with more butter and baking for an additional 2-3 minutes.
